name: programmer-chen
desc: Genshin Impact 3D anime style character portrait. Chinese young man, 25 years old, short black hair slightly messy, wearing gray hoodie with sleeves rolled up to elbows, black-framed glasses. Thin build. Warm indoor lighting, orange tones. Upper body portrait, 3/4 angle facing right. Cel-shaded 3D rendering, vibrant colors.

name: startup-office-night
desc: Genshin Impact 3D anime style indoor scene. Small 20sqm startup office at night. L-shaped desk with 2 monitors showing code, warm orange desk lamp, 5 empty coffee cups arranged on desk, folding sofa bed against wall, window showing city skyline with faint neon lights. Three light sources: orange desk lamp, blue monitor glow, faint neon through window. Cozy atmosphere, cel-shaded 3D rendering, warm tones, detailed environment.
